name: Poynt Corporation
summary: Poynt Corporation operates as a mobile local search and advertising company. Its flagship product includes the Poynt local search and advertising platform, a location-based search and advertising tool to connect consumers with local offers, businesses, restaurants, gas services, movie theatres, and events. The company offers Poynt platform for various devices, such as Android, iPhone, BlackBerry smartphones and BlackBerry PlayBook tablets, Windows Phone, and Nokia devices. It markets its products in Canada, the United States, the United Kingdom, Italy, France, Spain, Germany, Australia, and India. The company was formerly known as Multiplied Media Corporation and changed its name to Poynt Corporation in October 2010. Poynt Corporation is headquartered in Calgary, Canada. On July 6, 2012, Poynt Corporation filed for bankruptcy under Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act (Canada).
